推荐场景: 播客访谈现场｜综合问题、观点、例子、反方、总结
60秒任务: 「媒体 Boss」：问题/观点/例子/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 访谈｜观点展开｜例证｜反方观点｜总结｜态度识别
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s identify the speaker’s main claim.（识别主张）
What evidence supports that claim?（寻找证据）
The tone suggests ___.（推断语气）
The interviewer is pushing for ___.（识别主持目的）
The guest avoids answering ___ directly.（识别回避）
There’s a difference between fact and interpretation.（区分事实与解读）
The example is used to support ___.（例子功能）
The counterargument changes the focus.（反方改变焦点）
The key tension is between ___ and ___.（识别张力）
We should notice what is left unsaid.（关注未说之意）
That summary leaves out ___.（发现遗漏）
The strongest point is ___.（评价强论点）
The weakest part is ___.（评价弱点）
What action or judgment is implied?（推断隐含行动/判断）
Let’s compare the public message with the speaker’s real stance.（对比表述与真实立场）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: claim, evidence, tone, interpretation, counterargument, tension, stance, implication
Verbs: imply, suggest, support, avoid, interpret, compare, summarize, challenge
Adjectives / Tone: direct, indirect, balanced, biased, convincing, vague
Time / Place: in the interview, on air, in the summary, during the segment, off camera
Chunks: left unsaid, main claim, real stance, fact and interpretation, key tension
